title: Coords
description: Shows the exact coordinates of your location.
body:
## Description
Shows the exact coordinates of your location.

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3opMvIxN/images/6985cec8e16048113b2945f438fe3e651a823eea.png)

## How to use
To switch the visibility of coordinates, you need to enter this command

``` /trigger bizcub.coords.t ```

## Dependencies
- Fabric loader requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
